# skills-immigration

Immigration law skills for Claude Code.

## Skills

### case-summary
Write structured immigration case summaries for attorneys. Synthesizes facts, procedural history, current status, legal issues, and recommended next steps.

### client-letter
Write plain-language client status letters. Translates USCIS notices and case developments into jargon-free language for non-attorney clients.

### rfie-response
Write responses to USCIS Requests for Evidence (RFEs). Structures legal arguments, organizes evidence, and drafts the attorney cover letter/brief.

### visa-brief
Write visa category analysis briefs. Evaluates client facts against eligibility criteria and produces a structured strategy memo with recommended pathways.
